variables.input:
fetch security.events
| filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
// filter for events fitting the SD requirements
| filterOut isNull(event.type) or isNull(object.id)
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(event.provider)))
| fieldsAdd values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else:"None")

fetch security.events
| filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
// filter for events fitting the SD requirements
| filterOut isNull(event.type) or isNull(object.id)
| filter in(event.provider,$Provider)
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(product.name)))
| fields values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else:"None")

fetch security.events
| filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
// filter for events fitting the SD requirements
| filterOut isNull(event.type) or isNull(object.id)
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(object.type)))
| fieldsAdd values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else: "None")

fetch security.events
| filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
// filter for events fitting the SD requirements
| filterOut isNull(event.type) or isNull(object.id)
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(event.type)))
| fieldsAdd values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else: "None")

1.content:
# Security product coverage

Overview of the security product coverage across various objects and entities. Learn more about [Security events ingest](https://dt-url.net/1d63p0v).

19.content:
## Coverage overview
Distribution of security findings by reporting products and the corresponding affected object types.

30.title: Security events per top 10 products

31.title: Ingested finding events by provider over time

32.title: Scan events
32.query:
fetch security.events
| filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
  AND in(event.type,{"VULNERABILITY_SCAN","COMPLIANCE_SCAN"})
// filter for events fitting the SD requirements
| filterOut isNull(object.id)
// filter with the dashobard variables
| filter (in(event.provider, $Provider))
     AND (isNull(product.name) OR in(product.name, $Product))
     AND (in(object.type, $AffectedObjectType))
     AND (in(event.type,$EventType))
// get the latest vulnerability finding report for the affected entity and the component of the repository in the registry
| summarize count()

33.title: Reporting providers
33.query:
fetch security.events
| filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
// filter for events fitting the SD requirements
| filterOut isNull(event.type) or isNull(object.id)
// filter with the dashobard variables
| filter (in(event.provider, $Provider))
     AND (isNull(product.name) OR in(product.name, $Product))
     AND (in(object.type, $AffectedObjectType))
     AND (in(event.type,$EventType))
// get the latest vulnerability finding report for the affected entity and the component of the repository in the registry
| summarize Products=countDistinctExact(event.provider)

34.title: Ingested scan events over time

35.title: Finding events
35.query:
fetch security.events
| filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
  AND in(event.type,{"VULNERABILITY_FINDING","DETECTION_FINDING","COMPLIANCE_FINDING"})
// filter for events fitting the SD requirements
| filterOut isNull(object.id) or isNull(finding.id)
// filter with the dashobard variables
| filter (in(event.provider, $Provider))
     AND (isNull(product.name) OR in(product.name, $Product))
     AND (in(object.type, $AffectedObjectType))
     AND (in(event.type,$EventType))
// get the latest vulnerability finding report for the affected entity and the component of the repository in the registry
| summarize count()

36.title: Security events by object coverage per product

37.title: Security events by findings number per object type

38.content:
## Runtime entity coverage: Hosts
Dynatrace-monitored host entities covered by the various ingested findings.

39.title: Security events per top 10 object types

40.content:
## Runtime entity coverage: Container workloads
Dynatrace-monitored container workload entities covered by the various ingested findings.

41.title: Container workload coverage
41.query:
smartscapeNodes {K8S_DEPLOYMENT, K8S_CRONJOB, K8S_DAEMONSET, K8S_JOB, K8S_STATEFULSET, K8S_REPLICASET}
| fields id, containerNames=name, dt.source_entity=id_classic, workloadName=k8s.workload.name
| join [
  fetch security.events
  | filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
  | filter exists(dt.smartscape_source.id)
  // dashboard variables
  | filter (in(event.provider, $Provider))
   AND (isNull(product.name) OR in(product.name, $Product))
   AND (in(object.type, $AffectedObjectType))
   AND (in(event.type,$EventType))
  | dedup dt.smartscape_source.id, event.provider, product.name
  | fields dt.smartscape_source.id, event.provider, product.name
], kind:leftouter, on:{left[id]==right[dt.smartscape_source.id]}, 
   fields:{
     event.provider, product.name, dt.smartscape_source.id
   }
| append [
  fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance
  | fields containerImageDigest, containerNames, container_group.id=instance_of[dt.entity.container_group], 
           workload.id=belongs_to[dt.entity.cloud_application], workloadName
  | fieldsAdd dt.source_entity=coalesce(workload.id,container_group.id)
  | join [
    fetch security.events
    | filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
    | filter isNotNull(container_image.digest)
    // dashboard variables
    | filter (in(event.provider, $Provider))
     AND (isNull(product.name) OR in(product.name, $Product))
     AND (in(object.type, $AffectedObjectType))
     AND (in(event.type,$EventType))
    | dedup event.provider, product.name, container_image.digest
    | fields event.provider, product.name, container_image.digest
  ], kind:leftOuter, on:{left[containerImageDigest]==right[container_image.digest]}, 
    fields:{
     event.provider, product.name, container_image.digest
    }
]
| append [
  fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance
  | fields containerImageId, containerNames, container_group.id=instance_of[dt.entity.container_group], 
           workload.id=belongs_to[dt.entity.cloud_application], workloadName
  | fieldsAdd dt.source_entity=coalesce(workload.id,container_group.id)
  | join [
    fetch security.events
    | filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
    | filter isNotNull(container_image.id)
    // dashboard variables
    | filter (in(event.provider, $Provider))
     AND (isNull(product.name) OR in(product.name, $Product))
     AND (in(object.type, $AffectedObjectType))
     AND (in(event.type,$EventType))
    | dedup event.provider, product.name, container_image.id
    | fields event.provider, product.name, container_image.id
  ], kind:leftOuter, on:{left[containerImageId]==right[container_image.id]}, 
    fields:{
      event.provider, product.name, container_image.digest=container_image.id
    }
]
| fieldsAdd covered=if(isNotNull(container_image.digest) or isNotNull(dt.smartscape_source.id), "Covered", else:"Not covered")
| summarize {
  Entities=countDistinctExact(dt.source_entity)
}, by:{covered}

44.title: Container workload coverage by product
44.query:
smartscapeNodes {K8S_DEPLOYMENT, K8S_CRONJOB, K8S_DAEMONSET, K8S_JOB, K8S_STATEFULSET, K8S_REPLICASET}
| fields id, containerNames=name, dt.source_entity=id_classic, workloadName=k8s.workload.name
| join [
  fetch security.events
  | filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
  | filter exists(dt.smartscape_source.id)
  // filter for events fitting the SD requirements
  | filterOut isNull(event.type) or isNull(object.id)
  // dashboard variables
  | filter (in(event.provider, $Provider))
   AND (isNull(product.name) OR in(product.name, $Product))
   AND (in(object.type, $AffectedObjectType))
   AND (in(event.type,$EventType))
  | dedup dt.smartscape_source.id, event.provider, product.name
  | fields dt.smartscape_source.id, event.provider, product.name
], kind:leftouter, on:{left[id]==right[dt.smartscape_source.id]}, 
   fields:{
     event.provider, product.name, dt.smartscape_source.id
   }
| append [
  fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance
  | fields containerImageDigest, containerNames, container_group.id=instance_of[dt.entity.container_group], 
           workload.id=belongs_to[dt.entity.cloud_application], workloadName
  | fieldsAdd dt.source_entity=coalesce(workload.id,container_group.id)
  | join [
    fetch security.events
    | filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
    | filter isNotNull(container_image.digest)
    // filter for events fitting the SD requirements
    | filterOut isNull(event.type) or isNull(object.id)
    // dashboard variables
    | filter (in(event.provider, $Provider))
     AND (isNull(product.name) OR in(product.name, $Product))
     AND (in(object.type, $AffectedObjectType))
     AND (in(event.type,$EventType))
    | dedup event.provider, product.name, container_image.digest
    | fields event.provider, product.name, container_image.digest
  ], kind:leftOuter, on:{left[containerImageDigest]==right[container_image.digest]}, 
    fields:{
     event.provider, product.name, container_image.digest
    }
]
| append [
  fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance
  | fields containerImageId, containerNames, container_group.id=instance_of[dt.entity.container_group], 
           workload.id=belongs_to[dt.entity.cloud_application], workloadName
  | fieldsAdd dt.source_entity=coalesce(workload.id,container_group.id)
  | join [
    fetch security.events
    | filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
    | filter isNotNull(container_image.id)
    // filter for events fitting the SD requirements
    | filterOut isNull(event.type) or isNull(object.id)
    // dashboard variables
    | filter (in(event.provider, $Provider))
     AND (isNull(product.name) OR in(product.name, $Product))
     AND (in(object.type, $AffectedObjectType))
     AND (in(event.type,$EventType))
    | dedup event.provider, product.name, container_image.id
    | fields event.provider, product.name, container_image.id
  ], kind:leftOuter, on:{left[containerImageId]==right[container_image.id]}, 
    fields:{
      event.provider, product.name, container_image.digest=container_image.id
    }
]
| fieldsAdd Product=if(isNotNull(container_image.digest) or isNotNull(dt.smartscape_source.id), product.name, else:"Not covered")
| fieldsAdd Provider=if(isNotNull(container_image.digest) or isNotNull(dt.smartscape_source.id), event.provider, else:"Not covered")
| summarize {
  Entities=countDistinctExact(dt.source_entity)
}, by:{Provider, Product}
| sort Entities desc

45.title: Last 10 covered hosts
45.query:
fetch security.events
| filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
// filter for events fitting the SD requirements
| filterOut isNull(event.type) or isNull(object.id)
// filter with the dashobard variables
| filter (in(event.provider, $Provider))
   AND (isNull(product.name) OR in(product.name, $Product))
   AND (in(object.type, $AffectedObjectType))
   AND (in(event.type,$EventType))
| filterOut isNull(host.ip)
| expand host.ip
| fieldsAdd host.ip=ip(host.ip)
| join [
  smartscapeNodes HOST
  | fields id, name, ip
  | expand host.ip=ip
], kind:leftOuter, on:{host.ip}, fields:{dt.smartscape_source.id=id, name}
| filter isNotNull(dt.smartscape_source.id) or isNotNull(dt.smartscape_source.id)
| summarize {
  `Last event`=takeMax(timestamp),
  Findings=countIf(in(event.type,{"VULNERABILITY_FINDING","DETECTION_FINDING","COMPLIANCE_FINDING"})),
  Scans=countIf(in(event.type,{"VULNERABILITY_SCAN","COMPLIANCE_SCAN"})),
  Providers=collectDistinct(event.provider)
}, by:{dt.smartscape_source.id, Name=name}
| sort `Last event` desc
| fieldsAdd `Last event`=toDuration(now()-`Last event`)

46.title: Last 10 covered container workloads

47.content:
### Latest 50 security events
Recently ingested security events.

48.query:
fetch security.events
| filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
// filter for events fitting the SD requirements
| filterOut isNull(event.type) or isNull(object.id)
// filter with the dashobard variables
| filter (in(event.provider, $Provider))
     AND (isNull(product.name) OR in(product.name, $Product))
     AND (in(object.type, $AffectedObjectType))
     AND (in(event.type,$EventType))
// aggregation and custom filtering
| fieldsAdd object.name=coalesce(object.name, object.id)
| fields timestamp, Time=timestamp, Provider=event.provider, Product=product.name,
        `Event type`=event.type, `Object type`=object.type, `Affected object`=object.name
| sort {timestamp, direction:"descending"}
| fieldsRemove timestamp
| limit 50

49.content:
## Runtime entity coverage: Cloud entities
Dynatrace-monitored cloud entities covered by the various ingested findings.

50.title: Last 10 covered cloud entities
50.query:
fetch security.events
| filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
// filter for events fitting the SD requirements
| filterOut isNull(event.type) or isNull(object.id)
| filter exists(dt.smartscape_source.id)
// dashboard variables
| filter (in(event.provider, $Provider))
     AND (isNull(product.name) OR in(product.name, $Product))
     AND (in(object.type, $AffectedObjectType))
     AND (in(event.type,$EventType))
| join [
  smartscapeNodes "*", from:now()-24h
  | filter exists(cloud.provider)
], on:{left[dt.smartscape_source.id]==right[id]}, 
   fields:{name}
| summarize {
  `Last event`=takeMax(timestamp),
  Findings=countIf(in(event.type,{"VULNERABILITY_FINDING","DETECTION_FINDING","COMPLIANCE_FINDING"})),
  Scans=countIf(in(event.type,{"VULNERABILITY_SCAN","COMPLIANCE_SCAN"})),
  Providers=collectDistinct(event.provider)
}, by:{Type=dt.smartscape_source.type, dt.smartscape_source.id, Name=name}
| sort `Last event` desc
| limit 10
| fieldsAdd `Last event`=toDuration(now()-`Last event`)

51.title: Cloud entity coverage by product
51.query:
smartscapeNodes "*", from:now()-24h
| filter exists(cloud.provider)
| join [
  fetch security.events
  | filter dt.system.bucket == "default_securityevents"
  // filter for events fitting the SD requirements
  | filterOut isNull(event.type) or isNull(object.id)
  | filter exists(dt.smartscape_source.id)
  // dashboard variables
  | filter (in(event.provider, $Provider))
       AND (isNull(product.name) OR in(product.name, $Product))
       AND (in(object.type, $AffectedObjectType))
       AND (in(event.type,$EventType))
  | dedup dt.smartscape_source.id, event.provider, product.name
  | fields dt.smartscape_source.id, event.provider, product.name
], kind:leftOuter,
   on:{right[dt.smartscape_source.id]==left[id]}, 
   fields:{dt.smartscape_source.id, event.provider, product.name}
| fieldsAdd Product=if(isNotNull(dt.smartscape_source.id), product.name, else:"Not covered")
| fieldsAdd Provider=if(isNotNull(dt.smartscape_source.id), event.provider, else:"Not covered")
| summarize {
  Entities=countDistinctExact(id)
}, by:{Provider, Product}
| sort Entities desc

52.title: Cloud entity coverage
